new_classes.label_en: Wine Vinegar in Containers of More Than 2 Litres (CN 22090019)
new_classes.label_de: Weinessig in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von mehr als 2 Litern (KN 22090019)
new_classes.definition_en: Wine vinegar obtained by acetic fermentation of wine, presented in containers of more than 2 litres, classified under CN subheading 2209 00 19 (Chapter 22).

coverage_explanation: The primary distinguishing criterion for CN 22090019 is that it covers wine vinegar presented in containers of MORE than 2 litres (as opposed to CN 22090011 which covers containers of 2 litres or less). This container-volume threshold is captured via the decimalRange restriction (minExclusive 2 L) and the disjointness complement with WineVinegarSmallContainer. The codeString hasValue axiom anchors the class to the CN code. The legal note references Additional Note 11 to Chapter 22 and HS Explanatory Notes for heading 2209 — these are cross-references to external legal instruments not directly encodable as OWL axioms, resulting in a slight coverage gap (hence 0.8 rather than 1.0). The product character (wine vinegar from acetic fermentation of wine) is already fully captured by the parent class WineVinegar.
